title: Forms: Date Time / Hour Column
excerpt:

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com!

Our operations uses lots of forms and have been waiting for a long time for the TIME in the DATE column to be part of the Forms, but hasn’t. It’s not quite helpful to have a form with date ONLY, when an HOUR entry is required. I thought you might have had a work around with the HOUR Column, but it’s not supported by forms. So after so long of having forms, there isn’t an HOUR supported field other then a simple text column. I totally hope I’m wrong and that someone can tell me otherwise! if not, please consider having DATE and TIME (HOUR) supported in the forms.

Thanks

posts.author: Burto (Paul Burton)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree we these comments, have the same issue, can you help monday.com?

posts.author: alejencia (Alex Becerra)
posts.cookedHtml: @Burto I have not seen any traction on this issue. but one that is quite alerting for us form users. Thanks for the support!

posts.author: LotusEllen (A. Ellen Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also really like to be able to use the Hours column in forms!

posts.author: klyne_co (Monday CRM Win)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m so surprised that this is not a more requested feature in a very simple field on forms!
